Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Development is present.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Thomas Funanish is present.
Attorney Robert Chang representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled per JPT Barbara Anscher, the trial date of OCT-11-2011 is vacated.
